attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
COALESCE(SCO.WEB_ORDER_ID,-999) AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID  ,
SCO.ORDER_ID AS SK_CCW_ORDER_ID_INT   ,
COALESCE(SCO.ORDER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_NAME   ,
COALESCE(SCO.ORDER_SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_SOURCE_CD,
TRIM(COALESCE(SCO.ORDER_STATUS,-999)) AS CCW_ORDER_STATUS_INT ,
SCO.ORDER_VERSION AS CCW_ORDER_VERSION_INT   ,
COALESCE(SCO.ORG_ID,-999) AS FULFILLMENT_ORG_KEY,
COALESCE(SCO.PARTIAL_ORDER_FLAG,'N') AS PARTIAL_ORDER_FLG ,
TRIM(COALESCE(SCO.PRICE_LIST_ID,'UNKNOWN')) AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME ,
COALESCE(SCO.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
TRIM(COALESCE(SCO.QUOTE_ID,'UNKNOWN')) AS BK_QUOTE_NUM    ,
COALESCE(SCO.SUBMITTED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBMITTED_BY_NAME  ,
COALESCE(SCO.SUBMITTED_BY_PROXY,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBMITTED_BY_PROXY_NAME ,
COALESCE(SCO.SUBMITTED_ON, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))AS SUBMITTED_ON_DTM ,
CAST(SUBMITTED_ON_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_SUBMITTED_ON_DT   ,
COALESCE(SCO.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS UPDATED_BY_NAME               ,
COALESCE(SCO.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS  UPDATED_ON_DTM  ,
CAST(UPDATED_ON_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_UPDATED_ON_DT              ,
CASE WHEN ACTIVE=0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            ,
COALESCE(SCO.APPLICATION_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_SOURCE_ORG_TYPE_CD  ,
COALESCE(SCO.APPLICATION_SUB_FLOW,'UNKNOWN') AS CCW_ORDER_REASON_TYPE_CD  ,
COALESCE(SCO.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS  CREATED_BY ,
COALESCE(SCO.CREATED_BY_PROXY,'UNKNOWN') AS CREATED_BY_PROXY_USER         ,
COALESCE(SCO.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS  CCW_ORDER_CREATED_DTM,
CAST(CCW_ORDER_CREATED_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_CCW_ORDER_CREATED_DT       ,
COALESCE(SCO.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD  ,
COALESCE(SCO.DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_ID  ,
COALESCE(SCO.FLEX_SERVICE_START_DATE,16000101) AS FLXBL_SERVICE_START_DAYS_CNT  ,
COALESCE(SCO.FSD_VALIDATED,'N') AS FLXBL_SERVICE_ELIGIBILITY_FLG ,
COALESCE(SCO.HOLD_FLAG,'N') AS CCW_ORDER_ON_HOLD_FLG         ,
TRIM(COALESCE(SCO.INTENDED_USE,'UNKNOWN')) AS INTENDED_USE_TYPE_CD          ,
CASE WHEN XAAS_ORDER_FLAG = 'XAAS_NEW' THEN 'Y' 
    WHEN XAAS_ORDER_FLAG = 'XAAS_CHANGE' THEN 'N' 
    ELSE '=' END AS XAAS_ORDER_FLG                ,
COALESCE(SCO.FLOW_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS PROCESS_NEXT_STEP_CD          ,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE) AS BK_START_TV_DT                ,
CASE CCW_ORDER_STATUS_INT
    WHEN 1 THEN 'UNSUBMITTED'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'SUBMITTED'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'ON_HOLD'
    WHEN 11 THEN 'CHANGE_IN_PROGRESS'
    WHEN 20 THEN 'CHANGE_SUBMITTED'
    WHEN 21 THEN 'SUBMITTED_TO_CUSTOMER'
    WHEN 22 THEN 'RE_WORK'
    WHEN 23 THEN 'IPROC_UNSUBMITTED'
    WHEN 24 THEN 'IPROC_TRANSFERRED'
    WHEN 25 THEN 'CANCELLED_IN_IPROCURMENT'
    WHEN 26 THEN 'REJECTED_IN_IPROCURMENT'
    WHEN 27 THEN 'PENDING_APPROVAL'
    WHEN 28 THEN 'APPROVAL_REJECTED'
    WHEN 29 THEN 'SHARED_WITH_CUSTOMER'
    WHEN 30 THEN 'PENDING_FEDERAL_APPROVAL'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
	END AS DV_ORDER_STATUS_CODE,
COALESCE (SCO.TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_DISCOUNT_PCT,-999) AS TOTAL_EFFECTIVE_DISCOUNT_PCT ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
-999 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'I'                  ,
'='                     
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CO_ORDER SCO
